text.title: Experiment Hypothesis Scoring Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping rater + threshold + evidence signals to next action; each leaf cites a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the rubric frozen for this cycle?

conclusion.verdict: STOP — freeze rubric; defer edits to next cycle

branch.question: Does every score have evidence ≥ 10 chars?

conclusion.verdict: default missing-evidence scores to lowest band; re-score with anchors
add second rater (human or sonnet) before queuing
run third pass with discussion; do not queue yet
queued=false; record in holding-pen for next cycle re-evaluation

text.example: frozen=true → evidence=true → raters=2 → discrepancy=0 → threshold=false → min-entry-threshold → queued=false.
